name: Lanes Merging Without Reduction
meaning: Lanes are merging but no lane is being reduced. Traffic must merge smoothly.
color: White background, red border, black arrows

name: High Occupancy / Bus Lane
meaning: Designates a lane for high-occupancy vehicles (HOV) or buses only.
color: Blue background, white symbol and diamond with number

name: High Occupancy Parking Lane
meaning: Designates a parking lane for high-occupancy vehicles only.
color: Blue background, white P and diamond with number

name: Service Station
meaning: Freeway service sign showing available facilities (fuel, towing, accommodation) and their distances ahead.
color: Brown background, white text and symbols

name: Emergency SOS Call Station
meaning: Emergency SOS telephone call station at the specified distance ahead.
color: Brown background, yellow circle with SOS

name: Freeway Exit Direction
meaning: Indicates the direction to leave (exit) the freeway. GA4(E) variant has green background with EXIT.
color: Blue background, white arrow and route number

name: Crossroads Ahead
meaning: A crossroads (four-way intersection) is ahead. Approach with caution.
color: Red border triangle, white background, black cross symbol

name: T-Intersection Ahead
meaning: A T-intersection is ahead. The road you are on ends at a cross-road.
color: Red border triangle, white background, black T symbol

name: Keep Left / Left Lane Only
meaning: Keep to the left lane only. Mandatory instruction sign — must be obeyed.
color: Blue circle, white diagonal down-left arrow

name: Width Restriction — Yield to Oncoming
meaning: Road width is restricted. You must yield to oncoming traffic approaching from the other direction.
color: Red circle border, white background, red up arrow + black down arrow

name: Motorcycle Mandatory Lane
meaning: This lane is designated for motorcycles. Motorcyclists must use this part of the road.
color: Blue rectangle, white motorcycle symbol and R

name: No Overtaking by Goods Vehicles
meaning: Goods vehicles (trucks) are prohibited from overtaking other vehicles in this zone.
color: White circle, red border, two trucks with red diagonal strike

name: High Speed Exit — 100m
meaning: A high-speed exit ramp is 100 metres ahead. Begin to reduce speed in preparation.
color: Blue background, white diagonal stripe

name: Traffic Camera
meaning: A camera is monitoring the intersection at the traffic light for red light or speed violations.
color: White background, black border, traffic light + camera on tripod symbol

name: STOP
meaning: Come to a complete stop at the stop line. Proceed only when the way is completely clear.
color: Red octagon, white text STOP

name: YIELD (Give Way)
meaning: Give right of way to all traffic on the road you are entering. Stop if necessary.
color: Red border inverted triangle, white background with red YIELD text

name: Mandatory Turn Left
meaning: You must turn left. Mandatory instruction — no other direction is permitted.
color: Blue circle, white left-turn arrow

name: Alternative Route
meaning: There is an alternative route at the next intersection in the direction shown.
color: Green rectangle, yellow circle with A, white arrow

name: National Road Bridge Sign
meaning: Indicates the presence of a bridge on the specified national route.
color: Blue background, white N12 text and bridge arch symbol

name: Chevron Hazard Boards
meaning: Warns of a sharp bend, obstruction, or narrowing ahead. Slow down and be prepared to stop.
color: Red and white diagonal stripes
